title: palicourea persearum
intro: Palicourea persearum, also known as Quebra-Pedra or Pedra, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Palicourea persearum include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to increase urine production and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve kidney function, and treat conditions such as kidney stones and urinary retention. In herbal preparations, Palicourea persearum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional Brazilian medicine.
